overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a foggy, rain-soaked industrial street toward a large beached submarine structure. The environment features cracked pavement, abandoned industrial buildings, and heavy atmospheric effects with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial street with cracked pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-soaked cracked street toward a large distant submarine structure

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial building with weathered facade lining the left side of the street
tall metal street lamp with dual horizontal lights on the right sidewalk
massive red submarine conning tower beached in the middle of the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a desolate, rain-soaked industrial street with cracked asphalt. A red industrial building lines the left side while a tall street lamp stands on the right. In the distance through the heavy fog, the massive form of a beached submarine looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area approaching beached submarine vessel

events.description: passing the tall street lamp on the right, moving it behind the character

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the street lamp, steadily approaching the massive red submarine structure

entered.detail: metal scaffolding and catwalks attached to industrial buildings on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character passes the street lamp, which moves behind them, while the beached submarine grows larger in the center of the frame. Industrial scaffolding becomes visible on the right side of the street as the red building on the left recedes into the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: alongside beached submarine hull with industrial scaffolding

events.description: reaching the massive submarine structure and beginning to walk alongside its hull

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the massive red hull of the beached submarine, passing its curved metal structure

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the massive beached submarine, walking alongside its towering red hull which now dominates the left side of the frame. The industrial scaffolding on the right draws closer, creating a more enclosed corridor-like space as the distant red building fades from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement down a desolate industrial street that gradually narrows into a corridor beside a massive beached submarine. It begins with the character walking along cracked asphalt between a red industrial building and a tall street lamp, while the silhouette of the submarine looms through heavy fog in the distance. As the character passes the lamp, the red building recedes into the mist and the submarine grows larger in the center of the frame, revealing industrial scaffolding appearing on the right. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the vessel, with the towering red hull now dominating the left side of the view. Finally, the camera moves closer to the scaffolding on the right, creating an enclosed space as the distant buildings fade completely from sight.
